item.title: GOOGLE SERVICE CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GOOGLE SERVICE CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GOOGLE SERVICE CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Google Service Controller Magisk Module: Streamlining Your Android Experience
Introduction

In the vast Android customization landscape, Magisk modules play a pivotal role in enhancing user control over their devices. One such module that has garnered attention is the Google Service Controller, developed by the skilled developer known as RevWhiteShadow from the GodTspeed community. This Magisk module presents a unique approach to managing Google service apps on your Android device, offering users unparalleled control and convenience.

Overview

The Google Service Controller Magisk Module is designed to provide users with a powerful tool for managing Google service apps. It allows users to selectively disable all Google service apps, including system apps, with a simple toggle. This can be particularly beneficial for users seeking to optimize system resources, extend battery life, or enhance privacy by limiting Google's data collection.

Key Features

1. Comprehensive Google App Management
The module offers a comprehensive solution, enabling users to turn off all Google service apps at once. This includes popular apps such as Gmail, Google Maps, Google Drive, and more. This level of granularity empowers users to tailor their device's functionality according to their preferences.

2. Single-Click Restore
One of the standout features of the Google Service Controller is its single-click restore functionality. Users can effortlessly restore all Google service apps to their original state with a simple click. This ensures that users can quickly switch between customized and default configurations based on their needs.

3. Command-Line Control
For users comfortable with command-line interactions, the module supports an Android terminal command: su -c gsc. This command serves as a convenient way to toggle the module's functionality, providing a quick and efficient method for advanced users to manage Google service apps.

4. Developer Inspiration: GAppsLite
The Google Service Controller Magisk Module draws inspiration from GAppsLite, another well-known project in the Android customization community. GAppsLite aims to provide a minimal and streamlined set of Google apps, emphasizing efficiency and resource optimization. The Google Service Controller builds upon this concept, offering users additional control through its Magisk integration.

Developer Insights: RevWhiteShadow

RevWhiteShadow, the developer behind the Google Service Controller, is an active contributor to the GodTspeed community. This community, known for its focus on optimizing Android devices, benefits from the expertise and dedication of developers like RevWhiteShadow. The Google Service Controller reflects the developer's commitment to providing users with effective tools for managing their Android experience.

Conclusion

In the ever-evolving realm of Android customization, the Google Service Controller Magisk Module stands out as a valuable addition to the toolkit of users seeking control over their Google service apps. Its user-friendly approach, combined with advanced features like single-click restore and command-line control, makes it a versatile choice for a wide range of Android enthusiasts.

As you explore the capabilities of the Google Service Controller, remember that its development is an ongoing process. Regular updates and community feedback contribute to its refinement, ensuring that users continue to enjoy an optimized Android experience.

With the Google Service Controller Magisk Module, take charge of your device's Google services like never before – a testament to the power of Magisk modules in shaping the Android landscape.

[read more]
item.description:
GOOGLE SERVICE CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Google Service Controller Magisk Module: Streamlining Your Android Experience
Introduction

In the vast Android customization landscape, Magisk modules play a pivotal role in enhancing user control over their devices. One such module that has garnered attention is the Google Service Controller, developed by the skilled developer known as RevWhiteShadow from the GodTspeed community. This Magisk module presents a unique approach to managing Google service apps on your Android device, offering users unparalleled control and convenience.

Overview

The Google Service Controller Magisk Module is designed to provide users with a powerful tool for managing Google service apps. It allows users to selectively disable all Google service apps, including system apps, with a simple toggle. This can be particularly beneficial for users seeking to optimize system resources, extend battery life, or enhance privacy by limiting Google's data collection.

Key Features

1. Comprehensive Google App Management
The module offers a comprehensive solution, enabling users to turn off all Google service apps at once. This includes popular apps such as Gmail, Google Maps, Google Drive, and more. This level of granularity empowers users to tailor their device's functionality according to their preferences.

2. Single-Click Restore
One of the standout features of the Google Service Controller is its single-click restore functionality. Users can effortlessly restore all Google service apps to their original state with a simple click. This ensures that users can quickly switch between customized and default configurations based on their needs.

3. Command-Line Control
For users comfortable with command-line interactions, the module supports an Android terminal command: su -c gsc. This command serves as a convenient way to toggle the module's functionality, providing a quick and efficient method for advanced users to manage Google service apps.

4. Developer Inspiration: GAppsLite
The Google Service Controller Magisk Module draws inspiration from GAppsLite, another well-known project in the Android customization community. GAppsLite aims to provide a minimal and streamlined set of Google apps, emphasizing efficiency and resource optimization. The Google Service Controller builds upon this concept, offering users additional control through its Magisk integration.

Developer Insights: RevWhiteShadow

RevWhiteShadow, the developer behind the Google Service Controller, is an active contributor to the GodTspeed community. This community, known for its focus on optimizing Android devices, benefits from the expertise and dedication of developers like RevWhiteShadow. The Google Service Controller reflects the developer's commitment to providing users with effective tools for managing their Android experience.

Conclusion

In the ever-evolving realm of Android customization, the Google Service Controller Magisk Module stands out as a valuable addition to the toolkit of users seeking control over their Google service apps. Its user-friendly approach, combined with advanced features like single-click restore and command-line control, makes it a versatile choice for a wide range of Android enthusiasts.

As you explore the capabilities of the Google Service Controller, remember that its development is an ongoing process. Regular updates and community feedback contribute to its refinement, ensuring that users continue to enjoy an optimized Android experience.

With the Google Service Controller Magisk Module, take charge of your device's Google services like never before – a testament to the power of Magisk modules in shaping the Android landscape.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GOOGLE SERVICE CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Google Service Controller Magisk Module: Streamlining Your Android Experience
Introduction

In the vast Android customization landscape, Magisk modules play a pivotal role in enhancing user control over their devices. One such module that has garnered attention is the Google Service Controller, developed by the skilled developer known as RevWhiteShadow from the GodTspeed community. This Magisk module presents a unique approach to managing Google service apps on your Android device, offering users unparalleled control and convenience.

Overview

The Google Service Controller Magisk Module is designed to provide users with a powerful tool for managing Google service apps. It allows users to selectively disable all Google service apps, including system apps, with a simple toggle. This can be particularly beneficial for users seeking to optimize system resources, extend battery life, or enhance privacy by limiting Google's data collection.

Key Features

1. Comprehensive Google App Management
The module offers a comprehensive solution, enabling users to turn off all Google service apps at once. This includes popular apps such as Gmail, Google Maps, Google Drive, and more. This level of granularity empowers users to tailor their device's functionality according to their preferences.

2. Single-Click Restore
One of the standout features of the Google Service Controller is its single-click restore functionality. Users can effortlessly restore all Google service apps to their original state with a simple click. This ensures that users can quickly switch between customized and default configurations based on their needs.

3. Command-Line Control
For users comfortable with command-line interactions, the module supports an Android terminal command: su -c gsc. This command serves as a convenient way to toggle the module's functionality, providing a quick and efficient method for advanced users to manage Google service apps.

4. Developer Inspiration: GAppsLite
The Google Service Controller Magisk Module draws inspiration from GAppsLite, another well-known project in the Android customization community. GAppsLite aims to provide a minimal and streamlined set of Google apps, emphasizing efficiency and resource optimization. The Google Service Controller builds upon this concept, offering users additional control through its Magisk integration.

Developer Insights: RevWhiteShadow

RevWhiteShadow, the developer behind the Google Service Controller, is an active contributor to the GodTspeed community. This community, known for its focus on optimizing Android devices, benefits from the expertise and dedication of developers like RevWhiteShadow. The Google Service Controller reflects the developer's commitment to providing users with effective tools for managing their Android experience.

Conclusion

In the ever-evolving realm of Android customization, the Google Service Controller Magisk Module stands out as a valuable addition to the toolkit of users seeking control over their Google service apps. Its user-friendly approach, combined with advanced features like single-click restore and command-line control, makes it a versatile choice for a wide range of Android enthusiasts.

As you explore the capabilities of the Google Service Controller, remember that its development is an ongoing process. Regular updates and community feedback contribute to its refinement, ensuring that users continue to enjoy an optimized Android experience.

With the Google Service Controller Magisk Module, take charge of your device's Google services like never before – a testament to the power of Magisk modules in shaping the Android landscape.

[read more]

item.title: GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
#GSMxFAB #GODSPEED #FIX #AIM #BOOST
GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.
[read more]
item.description:
GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
#GSMxFAB #GODSPEED #FIX #AIM #BOOST
GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.
[read more]

GOD SPEED FIX AIM BOOST - GSM FAB
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
#GSMxFAB #GODSPEED #FIX #AIM #BOOST
GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FOX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.

item.title: Upscayl [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Upscayl [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Upscayl
(Graphic Apps)
Free and Open Source AI Image Upscaler. Upscayl lets you enlarge and enhance low-resolution images using advanced AI algorithms. Enlarge images without losing quality.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Upscayl
(Graphic Apps)
Free and Open Source AI Image Upscaler. Upscayl lets you enlarge and enhance low-resolution images using advanced AI algorithms. Enlarge images without losing quality.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Upscayl
(Graphic Apps)
Free and Open Source AI Image Upscaler. Upscayl lets you enlarge and enhance low-resolution images using advanced AI algorithms. Enlarge images without losing quality.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: Arduino IDE 2.x [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: Arduino IDE 2.x [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Arduino IDE 2.x
(Developers Apps)
The Arduino IDE 2.x is a major rewrite, sharing no code with the IDE 1.x. It is based on the Theia IDE framework and built with Electron. The backend operations such as compilation and uploading are offloaded to an arduino-cli instance running in daemon mode. This new IDE was developed with the goal of preserving the same interface and user experience of the previous major version in order to provide a frictionless upgrade.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Arduino IDE 2.x
(Developers Apps)
The Arduino IDE 2.x is a major rewrite, sharing no code with the IDE 1.x. It is based on the Theia IDE framework and built with Electron. The backend operations such as compilation and uploading are offloaded to an arduino-cli instance running in daemon mode. This new IDE was developed with the goal of preserving the same interface and user experience of the previous major version in order to provide a frictionless upgrade.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Arduino IDE 2.x
(Developers Apps)
The Arduino IDE 2.x is a major rewrite, sharing no code with the IDE 1.x. It is based on the Theia IDE framework and built with Electron. The backend operations such as compilation and uploading are offloaded to an arduino-cli instance running in daemon mode. This new IDE was developed with the goal of preserving the same interface and user experience of the previous major version in order to provide a frictionless upgrade.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: e2 SAT Editor [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: e2 SAT Editor [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
e2 SAT Editor
(Utilities)
e2 SAT Editor is a satellite channel lists editor, for Enigma2, Neutrino, dreambox lists. Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux, Unix-like BSD) and free to use.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
e2 SAT Editor
(Utilities)
e2 SAT Editor is a satellite channel lists editor, for Enigma2, Neutrino, dreambox lists. Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux, Unix-like BSD) and free to use.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
e2 SAT Editor
(Utilities)
e2 SAT Editor is a satellite channel lists editor, for Enigma2, Neutrino, dreambox lists. Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux, Unix-like BSD) and free to use.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
